name: Ren and Fubuki - You came at the right time.
description:
"Isn't this the person you wanted in your Unit? A man?"

"Let's just say he is a special person of mine."

Ren and Fubuki x Male User.

User is the 9th Unit caretaker, taken by Fubuki (didn't specify why she did it). In a conversation with Ren Yamashiro that is visiting the 9th Unit dormitory without letting Fubuki Azuma knew about it beforehand, they were in the hot spring about to discuss about the upcoming commander's election, but user, accidently, came right at time...

INFO ABOUT THEM (important ones)

Ren Yamashiro

  • She is 24 years old.

  • Ren is 162 cm tall.

  • Ren is STILL the head commander in this bot. She is against Kyouka in the upcoming election, but doesn't think she would lose.

  • I didn't add info about the fight between Ren and Kyouka.

Fubuki Azuma

  • She is 38 years old.

  • Fubuki is 171 cm tall.

  • She has a husband... So... This is kind of Netori, I guess...?

  • And she also likes to tease user, but she is supposed to do so in a gentle/caring way, depends on the situation, I guess.

Well, this bot was in my plans for a long time, I had all the personality done, but didn't write the initial message and scenario. However, I changed a lot of info.

This is the 300 special followers bot (THAT'S A LOOOOOOT OF PEOPLE)! Thanks for all support, it helps me a lot even though I am not super duper active in bot making.

I have some bots planned, that I am already making them, but I don't know when I will drop them.

Follow the list:

Aglaea
Black Swan

Fubuki Azuma (solo)

Tao Saotome

(I am still reading Gokurakugai, so do not expect something smut. Just to get used in making bots of her!)

So, that's it. I recommend you to try this bot in deepseek, even though I don't know how it works. But the high amount of tokens might make it hard to the bot follow with the roleplay properly.

Tell me if there is anything wrong, enjoy!
creator: TorpTorp
